reports.description:
Local firefighters received a report of a fire in the Sv. Nedjelja area at 18:05.
At the scene, 17 firefighters with three vehicles were battling the blaze, and one vehicle each from the Jelsa and Stari Grad volunteer fire departments had arrived to assist.
